Description: Name of the image series (typically the well name, e.g. ParentName_WellName).
Total number of cells detected across all tiles of this well.
Mean number of cells per tile across all tiles of this well.
Standard deviation of the number of cells per tile across all tiles.
Median number of cells per tile across all tiles.
Percentage of cells (0-100) that contain at least one granule.
Mean number of granules per cell across all cells in this well.
Standard deviation of the number of granules per cell.
Median number of granules per cell.
Mean number of granules per nucleus across all cells.
Standard deviation of the number of granules per nucleus.
Median number of granules per nucleus.
Mean number of granules per cytoplasm across all cells.
Standard deviation of the number of granules per cytoplasm.
Median number of granules per cytoplasm.
Mean cell area across all cells in square micrometers (um2).
Standard deviation of cell area in square micrometers (um2).
Mean cytoplasm area across all cells in square micrometers (um2).
Standard deviation of cytoplasm area in square micrometers (um2).
Mean nucleus area across all cells in square micrometers (um2).
Standard deviation of nucleus area in square micrometers (um2).
Mean of the per-cell nucleus mean intensities (nuclear stain channel).
Standard deviation of the per-cell nucleus mean intensities (nuclear stain channel).
Mean of the per-cell nucleus total intensities (nuclear stain channel).
Standard deviation of the per-cell nucleus total intensities.
Mean of the per-cell mean granule object intensities (averaged over individual granule objects within the cell).
Standard deviation of the per-cell mean granule object intensities.
Mean of the per-nucleus mean granule object intensities.
Standard deviation of the per-nucleus mean granule object intensities.
Mean of the per-cytoplasm mean granule object intensities.
Standard deviation of the per-cytoplasm mean granule object intensities.
Mean of the per-cell mean pixel intensities of the granules fluorescence channel over the entire cell area (background included).
Mean of the per-cell total pixel intensities of the granules fluorescence channel over the entire cell area.
Mean of the per-cell mean pixel intensities of the granules fluorescence channel within the cytoplasm region.
Mean of the per-cell total pixel intensities of the granules fluorescence channel within the cytoplasm region.
Mean of the per-cell mean pixel intensities of the granules fluorescence channel within the nucleus region.
Mean of the per-cell total pixel intensities of the granules fluorescence channel within the nucleus region.
Median of the per-cell mean pixel intensities of the granules fluorescence channel over the entire cell area.
Median of the per-cell mean pixel intensities of the granules fluorescence channel within the cytoplasm region.
Median of the per-cell mean pixel intensities of the granules fluorescence channel within the nucleus region.
Minimum per-cell mean pixel intensity of the granules fluorescence channel over the entire cell area. Used as a background estimate.
Minimum per-cell mean pixel intensity of the granules fluorescence channel within the cytoplasm region.
Minimum per-cell mean pixel intensity of the granules fluorescence channel within the nucleus region.
Background-corrected mean cell granule channel intensity: MeanCellGranulesChannelIntensity minus the minimum MeanCellGranulesChannelIntensity across all wells in the selection.
(Marker channel only) Mean of the per-cell mean pixel intensities of the marker fluorescence channel over the entire cell area.
(Marker channel only) Standard deviation of the per-cell mean marker channel intensities.
(Marker channel only) Mean of the per-cell total pixel intensities of the marker fluorescence channel over the entire cell area.
(Marker channel only) Mean of the per-cell mean pixel intensities of the marker channel within the cytoplasm region.
(Marker channel only) Standard deviation of per-cell mean marker channel intensities within the cytoplasm.
(Marker channel only) Mean of the per-cell total marker channel intensities within the cytoplasm.
(Marker channel only) Mean of the per-cell mean pixel intensities of the marker channel within the nucleus region.
(Marker channel only) Standard deviation of per-cell mean marker channel intensities within the nucleus.
(Marker channel only) Mean of the per-cell total marker channel intensities within the nucleus region.
(Marker channel only) Median of the per-cell mean marker channel intensities over the entire cell area.
(Marker channel only) Median of the per-cell mean marker channel intensities within the cytoplasm region.
(Marker channel only) Median of the per-cell mean marker channel intensities within the nucleus region.
(Marker channel only) Minimum per-cell mean marker channel intensity over the entire cell area. Used as background estimate.
(Marker channel only) Minimum per-cell mean marker channel intensity within the cytoplasm region.
(Marker channel only) Minimum per-cell mean marker channel intensity within the nucleus region.
(Marker channel only) Background-corrected mean marker channel intensity (MeanCellMarkerChannelIntensity minus minimum marker intensity of this well).
(Marker channel only) Number of cells classified as marker-positive (outlier detection based on MAD threshold).
(Marker channel only) Percentage of all cells in the well that are marker-positive.
(Marker channel only) Mean number of cell granules (x100) among marker-positive cells.
(Marker channel only) Mean number of nuclear granules (x100) among marker-positive cells.
(Marker channel only) Mean number of cytoplasmic granules (x100) among marker-positive cells.
(Marker channel only) Percentage of marker-positive cells that also contain at least one granule.
(Marker channel only) Average number of granules per marker-positive cell.
Average number of granules per cell computed as total granule count divided by total number of cells.
Numeric identifier for this well/series. Calculated as the series index multiplied by 10000.
Name of the parent container (e.g. well plate name). Set to n/a if no parent exists.
